questions.question: What U.S. state's official fish is the humuhumukunukunuapuaa?
What two French-titled plays won best musical Tony Awards in the 1980s?
questions.answer: La Cage aux Folles and Les Misérables

questions.question: Who did the FBI clear as a suspect in the Centennial Park bombing, after a three-month investigation?
How long do taste buds live on the tongue—ten days, ten months or ten years?
What baseball announcer said Pope Paul VI's death "puts a damper on even a Yankees win"?
What Elvis ballad did Chinese premier Jiang Zemin serenade Hawaiians with, in 1997?
